common.tagline: Turn scattered records into a consultation-ready case file.

home.title: Prepare your case without losing the details
home.subtitle: Collect contracts, payslips, deposits, and chats into one Evidence Pack.
home.dashboardSubtitle: Upload files and run analysis to prepare what to say in consultation.

next.uploadBody: Add contracts, payslips, deposits, and chat captures.
next.analysisBody: Check wage differences and missing files.
next.gpsBody: Attach workplace records to this case.

home.gpsBody: Turn it on early to keep attendance context with your case.
home.emptyBody: Start with the workplace name and the dates you remember.

login.title: Login to keep your case safe
login.subtitle: Your uploads and analysis stay connected to your account.
login.notice: Your account is created automatically on first login.
login.safe: BADA does not make legal judgments.

cases.title: My cases
cases.newSubtitle: It does not need to be perfect. Add what you know first.
cases.listHeroTitle: Manage every case in one place
cases.listHeroBody: Continue file upload, GPS records, analysis, and consultation prep by case.

actions.uploadBody: Add contracts, payslips, deposits, and chats for consultation.
actions.addMoreBody: Improve the pack with missing records.
actions.analyzeBody: Organize consultation prep from uploaded files.
actions.rerunBody: Refresh results with newly uploaded files.
actions.chatBody: Prepare what to say before consultation.

cases.emptyBody: Create your first case and add files.

upload.title: Upload files
upload.subtitle: Add photos, PDFs, and audio recordings to this case.
upload.tip: The content matters more than the file name. Add related files together.
upload.heroTitle: Upload files and check the organizing status
upload.heroBody: Keep contracts, payslips, deposits, and chat captures inside this case so analysis and consultation prep can continue.
upload.emptyBody: Start with contracts, payslips, and deposit records to run analysis.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.noneBody: Review your upload history and run the analysis.
analysis.needUpload: Upload files to this case before running analysis.

gps.title: GPS record
gps.subtitle: Keep workplace attendance context with your case.
gps.workplaceHint: Save your current location as the workplace to classify future pings as inside or outside.
gps.saveError: Could not save the workplace location.

chat.title: AI chat
chat.subtitle: Ask about preparation based on your Evidence Pack.
chat.emptyBody: Try asking about key points, missing files, or how to explain your case.
chat.quick1: What is important in this pack?
chat.quick2: What should I say first in consultation?
chat.quick3: What should I write in a petition?
chat.sourceFallback: A related section was referenced when preparing this answer.
chat.sourceNotice: This answer was generated using the relevant content from this source.
chat.error: Could not get a chat response.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Find similar situations and ask anonymously.
community.contentPlaceholder: Write the situation. Do not include personal information.
community.blocked: This cannot be posted because it includes personal information or asks for a legal judgment.
community.permissionBody: Only the author can edit this post.
community.titleRequired: Enter at least two characters for the title.
community.contentRequired: Enter at least two characters for the content.
community.safetyFailed: Could not complete the safety check.
community.composerSubtitle: Clear context helps others share more useful experiences.
community.titleExample: What would you like to ask?
community.contentExample: Describe what happened and which records you have.
community.safetyPolicy: We check personal information and requests for legal judgment. A post is not blocked only for emotional language or profanity.
community.safetyHelp: Check for personal information and legal-judgment requests before posting.
community.anonymousNotice: Your account details are hidden behind an anonymous community name.
community.deletePostBody: The post and its comments will no longer be available.
community.reportCompleteBody: We will review it under the community policy.
community.noCommentsBody: Share a helpful experience or ask a follow-up question.
community.reportHelp: Choose a reason. Your report is not shown to the author.

kakao.title: Link Kakao chatbot
kakao.subtitle: Send the code below to the BADA Kakao channel to check your case in the chatbot.
kakao.step2: Tap 'Open channel' and send the code in the BADA channel
kakao.step3: Linked — check your case in the chatbot
kakao.guide: You only need to connect once.
kakao.error: Could not issue a link code. Please try again later.
kakao.authError: Login required. Please sign in again.
kakao.channelError: Could not open the Kakao channel.

disclaimer: BADA does not make legal judgments. It organizes uploaded files for consultation preparation.
